overall.description: First-person walk through Los Santos International Airport in GTA V, beginning under a covered pedestrian walkway, approaching the terminal facade with 'Los Angeles International' signage, crossing the vehicle drop-off zone, and entering the terminal interior with check-in counters visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway approaching airport terminal

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered canopy toward the distant terminal building

entered.detail: metal and fabric canopy structure providing shade over the walkway
large modern airport terminal building with distinctive architecture visible in the distance
well-maintained green bushes and flowering plants lining the walkway sides
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the canopy roof structure

segments.scene_description: Walking under a long covered walkway with metal canopy overhead, approaching the Los Angeles International Airport terminal building in the distance. The path is lined with landscaped hedges and concrete pillars, with mixed lighting from the shaded overhead cover and open sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal facade with vehicle drop-off area

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open plaza area in front of the terminal building
camera tilts upward to view the Los Angeles International signage on the terminal facade
blue and yellow taxi cab drives past on the street in front of the terminal

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the terminal signage, then approaching the crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: taxi cab driving along the terminal front road, passing from right to left

entered.detail: large text signage reading 'LOS ANGELES INTERNATIONAL' on the terminal roof
painted white pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall metal pole with lighting fixtures near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright sunlight, the scene opens to the grand terminal facade with the 'Los Angeles International' signage visible overhead. The camera tilts up to view the building architecture, then returns to street level as a taxi passes by and a pedestrian crosses the white-striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal entrance and drop-off zone

events.description: approaching and entering the LSIA terminal entrance area
vintage style car drives past while crossing the terminal front road

agents.ego_description: crossing the vehicle drop-off road and approaching the LSIA terminal entrance doors

notable_agents.action: vintage two-tone car driving past the terminal entrance

entered.detail: illuminated red sign with white text 'LSIA' above the terminal entrance
glass and metal automatic doors leading into the terminal interior
short concrete posts lining the pedestrian approach to the entrance

segments.scene_description: Crossing the terminal front road marked with white crosswalk stripes, passing concrete bollards, and approaching the LSIA entrance with its prominent red illuminated sign. A vintage car drives past on the left as the camera moves toward the glass entrance doors.

events.description: transition from bright natural sunlight to artificial interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the terminal entrance into the check-in hall, passing large interior pillars

entered.detail: large cylindrical white pillars with green numbering marking the check-in zones
row of airline check-in desks with monitors and barriers visible in the distance
overhead directional sign indicating Delta check-in area
illuminated screens showing flight information mounted on pillars

segments.scene_description: Entering the terminal interior with artificial lighting replacing the natural sunlight, walking past large white numbered pillars and digital flight displays. The Delta check-in sign is visible overhead as the camera moves deeper into the airport check-in hall with tiled floors and airline counters in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shaded outdoor walkway into the bright terminal exterior and finally into the artificial light of the airport interior. It begins under a long metal canopy lined with hedges and concrete pillars, moving steadily toward the distant terminal building. As the camera emerges from the shade into bright sunlight, the scene opens to the grand facade and Los Angeles International signage, briefly tilting upward to capture the architecture before returning to street level as a taxi and pedestrian pass by. The movement continues across a white-striped crosswalk and past concrete bollards, gliding past a vintage car toward the red illuminated entrance sign. Finally, the camera passes through the glass doors, where natural light is replaced by the sterile glow of the check-in hall, moving past large numbered pillars and digital displays toward the distant airline counters.
